Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.buffer.read\(\)\); print\(f'Status: {d[\\"pipeline_status\\"]}'\); [print\(f'  {k}: {v[\\"status\\"]}'\) for k,v in d['skills'].items\(\)]")
